title: Clear Inputs and Results
user_story: As a user, I want to clear all entered values and displayed results with a single action, so that I can start a new calculation easily.
acceptance_criteria: A 'Clear' or 'Reset' button is visible on the interface.
Clicking the button empties all input fields.
The result display area is cleared after clicking the button.
The calculator returns to its initial ready state without requiring a page refresh.
